title: Silky Smooth Egyptian Eggs Wrap
description: A briny and velvety Egyptian dish featuring eggs and ssam wrap, perfect for midnight cravings, served in a claypot.
instructions: Preheat the claypot over medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
In a bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture into the claypot and scramble the eggs until they are almost set.
Add the crumbled feta cheese, pitted kalamata olives, artichoke hearts, and sun dried tomatoes to the eggs and stir gently.
Warm the ssam wrap sheets by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing a portion of the egg mixture onto the center of a ssam wrap sheet.
Sprinkle chopped fresh parsley over the egg mixture.
Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over the parsley.
Fold the bottom half of the ssam wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Serve the silky smooth Egyptian eggs wrap hot and enjoy.
